#nullable enable

namespace Demo;

public partial class M
{
    public partial global::Demo.TreeDto Map(global::Demo.Tree t)
    {
        if (t is null) throw new global::System.ArgumentNullException(nameof(t));
        var __dwarf_ctx = new global::DwarfMapper.DwarfRefContext(64);
        return new global::Demo.TreeDto
        {
            Left = __DwarfMap_Depth_Map(t.Left!, __dwarf_ctx, 0),
            Right = __DwarfMap_Depth_Map(t.Right!, __dwarf_ctx, 0),
            Val = t.Val,
        };
    }
    private global::Demo.TreeDto __DwarfMap_Depth_Map(global::Demo.Tree t, global::DwarfMapper.DwarfRefContext ctx, int depth)
    {
        if (t is null) return null!;
        if (depth >= ctx.MaxDepth)
            throw new global::DwarfMapper.DwarfMappingDepthException(ctx.MaxDepth, depth);
        return new global::Demo.TreeDto
        {
            Left = __DwarfMap_Depth_Map(t.Left!, ctx, depth + 1),
            Right = __DwarfMap_Depth_Map(t.Right!, ctx, depth + 1),
            Val = t.Val,
        };
    }
}
